happy.label: Happy
happy.description: You're radiating positive energy! Your facial expression shows genuine happiness and warmth.
wellness_tips: Share your positivity with someone today
Capture this moment in a gratitude journal
Engage in activities that maintain this joyful state
Use this energy to tackle a challenging task

sad.label: Sad
sad.description: It looks like you might be feeling a bit down. Remember, it's okay to feel this way.
wellness_tips: Take a few deep breaths and practice mindfulness
Reach out to a friend or loved one for support
Listen to uplifting music or watch something comforting
Consider a short walk outdoors to boost your mood

angry.label: Angry
angry.description: Your expression suggests frustration or anger. Let's work on channeling that energy positively.
wellness_tips: Try the 4-7-8 breathing technique to calm down
Step away from the situation briefly if possible
Write down what's bothering you to process emotions
Engage in physical activity to release tension

confused.label: Confused
confused.description: You seem to be contemplating something. Curiosity and reflection are signs of a thoughtful mind.
wellness_tips: Break the problem into smaller, manageable parts
Take a short break to clear your mind
Discuss your thoughts with someone you trust
Write down your questions to organize your thinking
